success_criteria: Framework agreement converting into procurement, delivery, EPS revision, and rerating is aligned.
failure_criteria: Prototype, news, or private valuation without revenue is price_moved_without_evidence.
normalization_point: Defense autonomous systems need government framework, volume, production, and delivery evidence.

success_criteria: Fab ramp-up and gas supplier FCF moving together is aligned.
failure_criteria: Fab delay or customer capex cut turning plant utilization weak is thesis_break.
normalization_point: Semiconductor gases are fab utility-like only when long-term onsite contracts are explicit.

success_criteria: NOI/AFFO and occupancy moving with price is aligned.
failure_criteria: Scale or IPO without AFFO quality, funding discipline, and occupancy is no_rerating.
normalization_point: Cold chain is infrastructure/REIT-like, not simple e-commerce logistics.

success_criteria: Water-reuse contracts plus recurring service revenue can support Watch-to-Green.
failure_criteria: Policy or water-scarcity narrative without customer revenue is event_watch.
normalization_point: Data-center water reuse is a useful AI infra sub-axis, but customer and revenue proof are required.

success_criteria: Contract, backlog, recurring connectivity revenue, and margin growth moving together is aligned.
failure_criteria: Space or satellite theme without revenue or with debt/capex pressure is false_positive.
normalization_point: Satellite connectivity must separate SpaceX theme labels from recurring service revenue.

success_criteria: Prototype converting into program-of-record and recurring revenue is aligned.
failure_criteria: Prototype/news without follow-on contracts is price_only.
normalization_point: Defense AI software needs software-like recurring contract evidence, not only AI defense headlines.

success_criteria: Bookings converting into revenue and OP is aligned.
failure_criteria: Theme rally followed by bookings slowdown or margin miss becomes 4B/4C.
normalization_point: AI data-center power equipment is internal power infra, distinct from grid transformers.

success_criteria: Defense-tech narrative converting into delivery, backlog, and EPS is aligned.
normalization_point: Counter-UAS and drones need actual military delivery and production-capacity proof.
